group.name: Welcome to G923 Steering Wheel Mod

plugin.name: Install G923 Steering Wheel Mod
plugin.description:
🎮 Cyberpunk 2077 G923 Steering Wheel Mod v3.0.0
This mod adds comprehensive Logitech G923 steering wheel support to Cyberpunk 2077.
🔧 REQUIREMENTS: • Cyberpunk 2077 v2.0+ • Cyber Engine Tweaks (CET) v1.32.0+ • Logitech G923 Steering Wheel • Windows 10/11 with DirectInput support
✨ FEATURES: • Real DirectInput hardware communication • Advanced force feedback with road texture simulation • Auto-calibration system with machine learning • Vehicle-specific handling for cars, motorcycles, trucks • 20+ console commands for configuration • Performance monitoring and optimization
📁 INSTALLATION: This mod will install to your CET mods directory: bin/x64/plugins/cyber_engine_tweaks/mods/cyberpunk-g923-mod/
🚀 GETTING STARTED: After installation: 1. Launch Cyberpunk 2077 2. Open CET console (~ key) 3. Type: g923_status() 4. Type: g923_calibrate("auto") 5. Get in a vehicle and test!
⚠️ IMPORTANT: Ensure Cyber Engine Tweaks is installed BEFORE installing this mod.

plugin.name: Ready to Use
plugin.description:
✅ Installation Complete!
Your G923 Steering Wheel Mod has been successfully installed.
🎮 NEXT STEPS: 1. Connect your Logitech G923 wheel 2. Launch Cyberpunk 2077 3. Open CET console with ~ key 4. Type: g923_status() to verify 5. Type: g923_calibrate("auto") for setup 6. Get in any vehicle and drive!
📖 ESSENTIAL COMMANDS: • g923_help() - Show all commands • g923_sensitivity(1.5) - Adjust steering sensitivity • g923_force_feedback(true) - Enable force feedback • g923_debug(true) - Enable debug mode
🔧 TROUBLESHOOTING: • If wheel not detected: g923_simulate(true) • For input issues: g923_debug(true) • For force feedback: g923_test_effects()
📋 DOCUMENTATION: Complete guides and troubleshooting included in mod files.
Happy driving in Night City! 🌃🚗
